overview: A free-roam 3D driving sandbox featuring authentic Indian vehicles — hatchbacks, motorcycles, and auto-rickshaws. Customize your ride with paint, performance upgrades, and cosmetics, then hit the open road, complete driving challenges, and climb the leaderboard.
features: Browse 12+ Indian vehicles across cars, motorcycles, and auto-rickshaws
Full customization: paint, decals, engine tuning, suspension, brakes, and neon underglow
Real-time 3D vehicle preview while applying modifications
Open-world free-roam map with city streets and rural roads
Challenge system with speed runs, parking, slalom, and off-road missions
Earn in-game Rupees from driving and challenges to unlock new vehicles and parts
Mobile-responsive with touch controls and virtual joystick
